overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a bus simulator game, navigating through heavy rain in a European city. The bus makes stops to pick up passengers at designated bus shelters while windshield wipers continuously clear the rain from the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: driving straight through heavy rain on a multi-lane urban road, approaching an intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on approaching from the opposite direction

multi-story residential buildings with balconies on the right side
traffic signal visible ahead at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through heavy rain on a wide urban street flanked by modern apartment buildings. Windshield wipers move continuously across the glass. An oncoming car approaches with headlights glaring through the rain, while traffic lights are visible in the distance.

events.description: bus begins right turn maneuver at the intersection
completes turn onto narrower residential street with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection onto a narrower residential street

entered.detail: open intersection area with crosswalk markings and traffic signals
entrance to the residential street becoming visible during the turn

segments.scene_description: The bus navigates a right turn at an intersection, transitioning from the main arterial road to a narrower residential street. The wider intersection space opens up visibility before narrowing again as the turn completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked cars and bus stop

events.description: approaching bus stop and preparing to stop for passengers

agents.ego_description: driving along the residential street approaching the designated bus stop shelter

segments.scene_description: The bus proceeds down a tree-lined residential street with parked cars on both sides. The first bus stop shelter comes into view on the right, with bicycles parked nearby. The windshield wipers continue their steady rhythm against the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop at the bus stop curb
bus doors open to allow passenger boarding

agents.ego_description: pulling up to the bus stop, opening doors, and waiting for passengers to board

notable_agents.action: passenger in blue shirt and jeans boarding the bus
passenger in brown jacket boarding the bus

entered.detail: interior view of bus door and entry area becoming visible as camera shifts

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at the first bus stop where two passengers are waiting under the shelter. The doors open and passengers board while the bus remains stationary. The shelter and parked bicycles recede into the background as the bus prepares to depart.

events.description: bus accelerates away from the first bus stop

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and continuing along the wet city streets toward the next destination

entered.detail: ground-floor commercial spaces with large windows and signage
contemporary multi-story building with glass facade elements

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates away from the stop, passing through a mixed-use area with commercial storefronts and modern apartment buildings. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet pavement as the bus navigates past parked cars.

events.description: bus stops at the second bus stop shelter
doors open to allow passengers to board

agents.ego_description: stopping at the second bus stop where passengers are waiting under the shelter to board

man in white shirt boarding the bus behind her

approach to the next intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at a second bus stop near an intersection. Two passengers board while waiting under the shelter. The bus remains stationary with doors open as the rain continues to fall outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-drenched urban environment, moving from a wide arterial road into a residential neighborhood. It begins on a broad city street flanked by modern apartments, where windshield wipers rhythmically clear heavy rain as oncoming headlights glare through the storm. As the bus executes a right turn at an intersection, the wide vista briefly opens before narrowing into a tree-lined residential street crowded with parked cars. The camera then slows to a halt at a bus shelter where passengers board, before accelerating again past commercial storefronts and wet, reflective pavements. Finally, the movement concludes as the bus approaches and stops at a second shelter near an intersection to pick up more passengers under the persistent downpour.
